race.comment: BULLS ON PARADE (11) has recaptured form and is ticking along nicely - closing hard to the line in his last two. Gets in well with the claim and will appreciate the anticipated tempo. Big threat. SHUTTLE RUN (3) didn't give his rivals a sniff last start at Clare when leading pillar-to-post. Should adopt the same tactics from the wide draw and will be in this for a long way. THE HASS (7) finished full of running last start behind SHUTTLE RUN and now meets him slightly better at the weights. Drawn well again and gets his chance to turn the tables. THE WIRRULLA BOY (4) will find this much easier and is a track and trip specialist. Can't overlook.
